scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently --names backend,frontend,swatch --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node swatch-service/start.js docker"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently --names backend,frontend,swatch --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node swatch-service/start.js local"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
